sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Valencia's form over the last 5 matches is inconsistent, with a heavy 6-0 loss to Barcelona but a strong 3-0 win over Getafe. Athletic Club, despite a better league position (7th vs Valencia's 16th), has struggled recently, losing their last 3 matches without scoring.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head matches, Athletic Club has dominated with two 1-0 victories over Valencia. Their ability to score decisive goals, often late, has been a key factor in these encounters.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Valencia struggles offensively (4 goals scored, ranked 13th) and defensively (8 goals conceded, ranked 16th), while Athletic Club shows a balanced attack and defense (6 goals scored and conceded). Athletic's slight edge in expected goals and big chances created gives them a marginal advantage.

sections.subtitle: Match Context and Trends
sections.text: Both teams tend to play low-scoring games, with Athletic Club often scoring late (post-60th minute). Trends suggest fewer than 4.5 cards and 10.5 corners in their matches, reflecting a tactical, less aggressive style in head-to-heads.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Half-time overview
halftimeSections.text: The first half of this clash at Mestalla between Valencia and Athletic Club ended in a goalless draw, with neither side managing to break the deadlock. Athletic Club dominated possession and created far more opportunities, showing greater intent in the attacking third. Valencia, on the other hand, struggled to impose themselves, spending much of the half on the back foot. Despite the lack of goals, the game has been intense, with Athletic Club looking the more likely to score.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Team performance analysis
halftimeSections.text: Athletic Club showcased their dominance in key areas, controlling the ball for the majority of the half and making frequent entries into the final third and penalty area. Their ability to win duels, especially in the air, has been a significant advantage. Valencia, however, have been less effective, with limited possession and fewer penetrative moves forward. Their defensive structure has held firm so far, but they’ve lacked the spark needed to threaten consistently. Athletic Club's higher expected goals reflect their superiority in creating chances.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attack momentum breakdown
halftimeSections.text: From the opening whistle, Athletic Club took control of the attacking momentum, pressing high and sustaining pressure in Valencia’s half for extended periods. Their attacking spells were frequent and intense, especially in the early stages and towards the end of the half. Valencia had brief moments of momentum shift in their favor, particularly around the middle of the half, but these were short-lived as Athletic Club quickly regained dominance. The away side’s relentless forward push suggests they are more likely to capitalize in the second half.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Key player performances
halftimeSections.text: For Athletic Club, players like Oihan Sancet and Iñaki Williams have been central to their attacking threat, consistently getting into dangerous positions. Their contributions in the final third have kept Valencia’s defense on edge. On the Valencia side, César Tárrega has stood out defensively with crucial interventions, while Javier Guerra has shown glimpses of creativity despite limited opportunities. Both teams will need their key figures to step up if they are to find the net after the break.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Tactical insights
halftimeSections.text: Athletic Club’s approach has been to dominate possession and exploit the width of the pitch, using their physicality to win duels and maintain pressure. Their strategy of pushing numbers forward has worked well, though they’ve lacked the final touch to convert chances. Valencia, meanwhile, have relied on a more compact shape to absorb pressure, looking to counter when possible. However, their lack of precision in the final third has hindered any real threat. Adjustments at half-time could see Valencia push higher up the pitch to disrupt Athletic Club’s rhythm.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Second half expectations
halftimeSections.text: The second half is likely to see Athletic Club continue their aggressive approach, pushing for a breakthrough with their superior attacking intent. Valencia will need to be more adventurous if they are to turn the tide, potentially taking risks to create chances on the counter. Fatigue could play a role, especially for Valencia’s defense, which has been under constant pressure. A goal seems more likely for the away side given their first-half dominance, but Valencia’s resilience at home could still yield surprises.
